title: JVL Seagrass Set of 3 Rectangular Storage Baskets, Natural
features: A must have accessory for every household
These seagrass baskets are woven onto a metal frame and come in three versatile sizes
Help clear clutter and organise the home with style
Display them as a feature or use as storage options
Large - H:14 x W:36 x D:23cm approx. Medium - H:13 x W:33 x D:20cm approx. Small - H:12 x W:30 x D:17cm approx.
description: Seagrass is a renewable source, a fast-growing plant that grows in the sea. Renewable materials come from living sources and regrow as quick as they’re used. Seagrass is hand-woven by highly skilled artisans; its neutral tones and strength make it ideal for basket-weaving and compliment the home décor. Please note, shades may also vary from the images shown as our products are made from natural materials
